Nicktoons.uk.title: The Loud House
Nicktoons.uk.desc: Luan struggles to direct her school play in 'Director's Rut', then in 'Friday Night Fights', Lisa joins Lynn's football team as the analytics coach to prove that maths always beats heart.

Nicktoons.uk.title: The Loud House
Nicktoons.uk.desc: When Royal Woods is in danger of being flooded to make room for a sixth Great Lake, the town comes together to prove that they're worth saving.

Nicktoons.uk.title: The Loud House
Nicktoons.uk.desc: Lisa accidentally blasts herself and Todd into space in 'Space Jammed', then in 'Crown and Dirty', Lola tries to whip Mom into tip-top pageant condition for a Mother-Daughter pageant.

Nicktoons.uk.title: The Loud House
Nicktoons.uk.desc: Luna and the Moon Goats have to find a replacement guitarist in 'Music To My Fears', then in 'Fluff and Foiled', Lincoln is determined to get laundry duty finished as fast as possible.

Nicktoons.uk.title: The Loud House
Nicktoons.uk.desc: The Louds gather ingredients for an italian chef in 'Nonna Your Business', and the road trip continues in 'Alpining Away', when Lynn crushes on a boy.

Nicktoons.uk.title: The Loud House
Nicktoons.uk.desc: Lincoln avoids his chores in a high-tech way in 'Hologram Jam', then in 'Sick as a Dad', the Loud siblings are tasked with taking care of Dad when he overreacts to getting a cold.

Nicktoons.uk.title: The Loud House
Nicktoons.uk.desc: Lincoln is going to his first rock concert in 'For Bros About to Rock', then in 'It's a Loud, Loud, Loud, Loud House', Lincoln finds a letter suggesting there is money hidden in the house.

Nicktoons.uk.title: The Loud House
Nicktoons.uk.desc: Mom and Dad win a trip to a resort and decide to take the kids in 'Suite and Sour', then in 'Back in Black', when Lucy gets a crush on a regular normal boy, her sisters give her a makeover.

Nicktoons.uk.title: The Loud House
Nicktoons.uk.desc: Dad and Lincoln get on Legends of the Hidden Temple in 'Legends', and in 'Mall of Duty', Lincoln wants to go to the mall but has to watch his younger sisters, so he takes them to the mall.

Nicktoons.uk.title: The Loud House
Nicktoons.uk.desc: Lana learns her favourite fish are in jeopardy in 'Scales of Justice', then in 'Crimes of Fashion', Leni gets fired from her job, so Lincoln and Clyde (as Ace and Jack) take on the case.
